_comment: Saturn session state — updated by the agent at start and end of each 4-hour session.
_session_40_note: Session 40 (2026-06-03, Wednesday): ALAB Computex June 3 press conference captured. Three thesis upgrades: (1) UALink support formally disclosed — ALAB is stack-agnostic (NVLink Fusion + UALink); (2) CXL KV Cache design win with second, unnamed hyperscaler (ships 2027) — first CXL custom win beyond Amazon; (3) NVLink Fusion custom design win with NVIDIA + hyperscaler. DCF re-run: IV $111.84, MoS -65.5% SELL/AVOID at $324.19. MRVL entity updated with Jensen 'next trillion-dollar company' endorsement (+32.52% on June 2 to $290.79, not captured by Session 39 which ran 4am EDT pre-market). All 7 positions now SELL/AVOID — TSM crossed -10% MoS threshold at $435.63 June 2 close (+4.1% from carry). Price moves: TSM +4.1%, ASML +5.7%, ANET +9.1% all added to event_queue. MRVL +32.52% added to event_queue for DCF re-run at new price. Custom-silicon concept page updated. Phase 1b/1c gated (40%6=4).

event_queue.event: Q3 FY2026 earnings confirmed June 24, 2026 (2:30pm MT). DCF re-run queued post-earnings. Prior DCF: IV $442.63, MoS -57.3% at ~$1,035. MU broke $1,000 + $1T market cap June 1. TrendForce Q2 DRAM +58-63% confirms thesis; Q3/Q4 pricing still rising. No deep session before June 24.

May monthly revenue release ~June 8. April was NT$410.73B (+17.5% YoY), 2nd-highest ever. May result confirms Q2 AI demand trajectory. Also: ex-dividend $0.955 ex-date June 11. NEW: TSM +4.1% to $435.63 (June 2 close); 52-week high $449.39 intraday; $2T market cap milestone; MoS now -11.8% SELL/AVOID (was HOLD). DCF re-run needed after May revenue.

June 2: Jensen Huang called MRVL 'the next trillion-dollar company' at Computex — stock +32.52% to $290.79 (biggest single-day gain ever). Session 39 DCF IV $126.67 at $219.26; at $286.70 (June 3 est.) MoS = -55.8%. DCF re-run needed at current price. Also track: Google MPU/inference TPU talks (no contract yet); Morgan Stanley PT watch.

June 2: +5.7% to $1,704.72 (from $1,612.76 session 39 carry). Morgan Stanley raised PT to EUR 1,660 (~$1,840) from EUR 1,400. Intel accepted EXE:5200 High-NA for HVM — first High-NA HVM milestone. DCF last run May 22 (>10 days, approaching 30-day threshold). Monitor for Q2 2026 results.

June 2: $174.36 confirmed close (from $159.80 session 39 carry = +9.1%). ANET June 1 +5.77% per TradingKey. No specific catalyst — AI infrastructure rerating on NVDA/MRVL Computex wave. DCF last run May 22. Price move warrants attention; MoS now -27.2% SELL/AVOID.
